hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" | grep -Eq '(rm -rf [/~]|rm -rf [*]|curl.*[|].*sh|wget.*[|].*bash|mkfs|sudo )'; then echo 'BLOCKED: dangerous command pattern'; exit 2; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '[.]html$'; then for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do echo "$f" | grep -q -e '/output/' -e '/projects/' -e '^output/' -e '^projects/' || continue; [ -f "$f" ] && grep -q '<html' "$f" && grep -q '</html>' "$f" || echo "WARN: $f may be incomplete HTML"; grep -q '{{' "$f" && echo "WARN: unfilled placeholder in $f"; done; fi
